source: GTAP 11 Database (Corong et al. 2017), Purdue University.
version_notes: Iteration-4 seed. Carries one entry: 'tex' (textiles & wearing apparel) at 3.8, used by india-us-textiles.json and vietnam-us-textiles.json. Additional GTAP sectors land as new corridor/commodity pairs are added in later iterations. The Armington elasticity is sector-level, NOT country-level: the 'tex' figure applies to any exporter shipping textiles into any importer. The corridor file selects the sector; this file supplies the elasticity.

tex.source_paper: Corong, E. L., Hertel, T. W., McDougall, R. A., Tsigas, M. E., & van der Mensbrugghe, D. (2017). The Standard GTAP Model, Version 7. Journal of Global Economic Analysis 2(1). Median 3.8 across 3,524 elasticity estimates per the 2019 meta-analysis (range 2.5-5.1).
